listings.description: Tucked along the most coveted street in Historic Downtown Leesburg, this is a rare and remarkable opportunity to restore and reimagine a piece of local history. Set on prestigious Cornwall Street in NW Leesburg - just moments from the boutiques, restaurants, coffee shops, and community life of downtown - this historic residence is waiting for its next passionate steward. For the buyer who reveres historic architecture and understands the irreplaceable value of location, character, and craftsmanship, this property offers extraordinary potential. The home is being sold AS-IS with thoughtfully designed architectural plans already approved by the Town of Leesburg's Board of Architectural Review (BAR), saving the next owner significant time, expense, and uncertainty. The approved plans expand the residence from approximately 1,840 to over 3,000 finished square feet and envision a beautifully livable historic home with four bedrooms, 3.5 baths, a gracious primary suite, and a modern kitchen flowing seamlessly into open family and dining spaces. Additional features include a screened porch, mudroom, laundry room, and detached two-car garage with driveway parking - all carefully designed to honor the home's historic integrity while elevating everyday living. Extensive groundwork has already been completed by the current owner, including over $100,000 invested in architectural planning, BAR approval, site clearing, tree removal, exterior restoration, lead-safe paint remediation, debris removal, and preparation for renovation. The non-historic addition to the guest house has also been removed to better preserve the property's architectural authenticity. This is not a project for the faint of heart - but for the visionary buyer, the reward is the opportunity to create something truly exceptional on one of Leesburg's most treasured streets. Please note: Located within Leesburg's Historic District, exterior modifications to the home remain subject to BAR approval. Interior renovations are at the discretion of the homeowner. The home may not be demolished. Listing price is below tax-assessed value. Cash buyers preferred. Showings by appointment only with proof of funds. Serious inquiries only. *All information deemed reliable but not guaranteed. All measurements and data should be independently verified by the buyer* Owner is agent.

Beautiful 4-Bedroom single family home for sale in the heart of Leesburg! Featuring over 3,000 finished square feet, this bright and open floor plan sits on a premium lot backing to trees for added privacy. Fresh paint throughout many areas gives the home a clean, updated feel. The main level offers an open-concept layout with a spacious kitchen featuring a granite breakfast bar and upgraded appliances that flows seamlessly into the family room and sunroom. You'll also find a traditional dining room and a main-level office, perfect for working from home. Step outside to a custom stone stairway leading to the patio and private backyard surrounded by trees. Upstairs, the primary suite features hardwood flooring, a walk-in closet, and a luxurious bath with dual vanities, a corner soaking tub, and separate shower. Three additional spacious bedrooms include two with walk-in closets, along with a full hallway bath and convenient bedroom-level laundry with front-load washer and dryer. The huge unfinished walk-up basement offers endless possibilities for a home gym, workshop, or additional storage. Conveniently located just minutes from Historic Downtown Leesburg's shops, restaurants, and top-rated schools. Don't miss this opportunity - schedule your tour online today!

*** $70,000 PRICE REDUCTION*** Bright Interiors and Flexible Living in Foxridge ***The Narrative: This sun-splashed residence on a quiet pipestem in Foxridge offers a crisp, updated atmosphere with fresh paint and new carpet throughout. The heart of the home is an airy kitchen featuring stone countertops and stainless steel appliances, flowing into a breakfast area illuminated by vaulted ceilings and skylights. Adjacent to the kitchen, the living area features a custom-tiled fireplace and direct access to an expansive rear deck, perfect for peaceful mornings overlooking the private backyard. The upper level includes a versatile, oversized loft area that can easily adapt to a secondary workspace or be enclosed for additional privacy. With three finished levels and immediate proximity to the W&OD Trail, this home provides a seamless connection to the outdoors and the amenities of nearby downtown Leesburg., The Data: 4 Bedrooms | 3.5 Bathrooms | Upper-Level Loft | 2-Car Garage with storage system.

Welcome to 306 Lounsbury Ct NE - a beautifully updated split-level home in the heart of historic Leesburg offering NO HOA and fully paid-off solar panels for exceptional long-term value. More than just move-in ready, this home offers a rare combination of comfort, efficiency, and smart homeownership. While many homeowners experienced rising utility costs this winter, the current owners enjoyed electric bills averaging approximately just $10/month thanks to the owned solar panel system. It's a valuable advantage in today's market, providing meaningful monthly savings and protection against increasing energy costs - without the added expense of a solar loan or lease. Inside, the home features a comfortable and functional layout with four bedrooms and two full bathrooms upstairs, including a spacious primary suite with dual closets for practical storage. Natural light fills the home throughout the day, while the skylight creates a warm and inviting ambiance in the evening. The main level is designed for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious kitchen opens to the family room, where a cozy fireplace and built-in entertainment center create a welcoming gathering space. French glass doors offer flexibility and privacy when desired, while sliding doors lead directly to the backyard for easy indoor-outdoor living. A formal dining room and an additional living area provide plenty of space to host guests, relax, or work comfortably from home. Recent updates include fresh paint throughout, brand-new carpet, updated lighting, refreshed bathrooms, and a clean, modern feel from top to bottom. Additional highlights include a two-car garage, spacious backyard, and an unbeatable location just a few blocks away from Downtown Leesburg, where you can enjoy local shops, restaurants, community events, and historic attractions while still benefiting from a quiet residential setting. The home is also located just one mile from Ida Lee Park, Leesburg's renowned 138-acre recreation destination featuring indoor and outdoor pools, sports fields, walking trails, playgrounds, and a full recreation center. With an improved price, energy-saving features, and a highly desirable location, this is an opportunity you do not want to miss. (Virtually Staged)

A Century of Character in Downtown Leesburg Leesburg Historic District, Leesburg, VA 3 BD | 1 BA | 1/3 Acre Lot | Built 1910 | Detached 2-Car Garage | Sold As-Is Steeped in history and full of original charm, this 1910 craftsman-era home sits proudly in the heart of Leesburg's beloved Historic District - lovingly cared for by the same family for over 50 years. Offered for sale as-is, this is a rare chance to own a piece of Leesburg history and make it your own. Step up onto the welcoming covered front porch - the perfect spot for a morning coffee - and into a home that has been cherished across generations. Inside, warm and cozy bedrooms invite rest, while the bathroom retains its original claw-foot tub, a true hallmark of the era. Original hardwood floors are believed to lie beneath the current flooring, waiting to be uncovered and restored to their former glory. The property sits on an exceptional 1/3-acre lot - a genuinely rare find in downtown Leesburg - offering space, privacy, and possibilities that simply don't come along often in this location. A detached two-car garage adds even more practical value. Whether you're a preservation enthusiast, an investor, or a buyer dreaming of restoring a classic home to its original splendor, this property delivers unmatched potential in one of Northern Virginia's most sought-after historic neighborhoods. Properties like this - with this much soul - rarely come to market. HISTORIC DISTRICT NOTICE: This property lies within the Town of Leesburg Historic District. Future exterior renovations and alterations are subject to review and approval by the Leesburg Board of Architectural Review (BAR). Prospective buyers are encouraged to familiarize themselves with applicable guidelines prior to making an offer. ADDITIONAL NOTICE: The home is currently occupied and furnished. AI-assisted editing was used to remove furnishings from interior listing photos. Property is being sold strictly as-is.

Charming 2-bedroom, 2 full bath bungalow in the heart of Downtown Leesburg's Old & Historic District offering the perfect blend of historic character and modern luxury. Nestled on picturesque Ayr Street, this thoughtfully designed home features a secluded retreat-like backyard with a beautiful flagstone patio and detached 1-car garage, along with a long driveway providing additional off-street parking. Inside, enjoy hardwood floors throughout, a gourmet kitchen, custom recessed lighting, custom built-in shelving, custom window seats, two fireplaces, and a fully finished basement that could serve as a third bedroom and includes rough-in plumbing for a 1/2 bath. The upper level offers a spacious primary suite with a private full bath, while the second upstairs full bath features a frameless glass shower enclosure. HVAC and hot water heater were replaced in 2020. Built in 2007 by renowned local builder Paul Reimers as part of an award-winning infill development project in Downtown Leesburg's Historic District, 4 Ayr Street was thoughtfully designed to reflect the architectural character and charm of the original early 20th century homes once found along Ayr Street while incorporating the modern conveniences and living spaces desired today. All just moments from shops, restaurants, parks, and everything Downtown Leesburg has to offer.

Welcome to 408 Cherry Lane - a fully renovated three-level home offering the look and feel of new construction in the heart of Leesburg. This stunning home features 4 bedrooms and 5 fully renovated bathrooms, with every element of the interior completely brand new from top to bottom. Situated on a private, fully fenced 0.38-acre lot, the property boasts a level backyard and a brand-new paved driveway with dual garage doors equipped with upgraded belt-drive motors, new remotes, and keypads. The exterior showcases all new Low-E argon vinyl windows, PVC trim, a new fiberglass front door, French patio door, LED lighting, a Ring doorbell, and an expansive 30' x 16' Trex double-deck overlooking refreshed landscaping with new sod and plantings. Inside, the home is completely transformed with luxury vinyl plank flooring, fresh paint, upgraded trim, and all interior doors replaced with custom doors and upgraded hardware, along with a stunning chef's kitchen featuring new cabinetry with custom crown molding, a large island, quartz countertops with waterfall edge, tile backsplash, and brand-new Samsung stainless steel appliances. All five bathrooms are fully remodeled with high-end finishes and custom tile work. Additional home upgrades include 48 recessed LED lights, new ceiling fans, updated electrical throughout, a brand-new 200-amp panel, new American Standard HVAC system, water heater, sump pump, washer and dryer, and an epoxy-finished garage floor. Ideally located in a well-established, no-HOA community with access to trails and within walking distance to shopping, dining, and everyday conveniences, this home offers unbeatable proximity to Leesburg Premium Outlets, Costco, and major commuter routes including Route 7 and Route 15, all within a highly sought-after school district.

Located near Historic Downtown Leesburg, this gem of a property is tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac within one of the town's most charming neighborhoods. This beautifully appointed 4-bedroom 3.5 bath residence blends classic character with modern livability in an unbeatable location. Enjoy sun-filled living spaces, refined comfort, tasteful updates, and a private fenced and wooded backyard that backs to county parkland. Interior features include upgraded kitchen and primary bath with skylight, stunning brick wood-burning fireplace, dramatic vaulted ceiling primary suite, gorgeous low-maintenance LVP flooring (2024) throughout most of the main level, basement, and primary suite, along with brand-new plush carpeting in guest bedrooms. A main-level home office offers flexibility and could easily serve as a 5th bedroom. The finished basement is perfectly suited for entertaining. Additional updates include a new HVAC system (2023) and roof replacement (2010). The home also offers abundant storage with ample closet space, spacious garage loft, and a sizable attic. Relax in your own private backyard oasis. Expertly landscaped with a peaceful natural setting, the outdoor space features a low-maintenance waterfall and koi pond, creating the perfect retreat. French doors off the family room open to a screened porch ideal for quiet mornings, while the expansive deck and patio are perfect for entertaining. An inset 8-person hot tub completes the space-perfect for unwinding after a long day.

listings.address: 405 Edwards Ferry Rd NE, Leesburg, VA, 20176
listings.description: Built in 1949 and completely renovated and remodeled in 2019, this stunning home perfectly blends timeless character with modern style and convenience. Situated on over a quarter-acre lot within walking distance of historic downtown Leesburg, this property offers the rare opportunity to enjoy the highly sought-after lifestyle of strolling to local restaurants, boutiques, coffee shops, and the many festivals and community events that make this charming town so special. Featuring an efficient floor plan with 4 bedrooms and 3.5 beautifully updated bathrooms, the home was thoughtfully redesigned with both comfort and entertaining in mind. The inviting open floor plan creates a warm and welcoming atmosphere centered around a lovely kitchen with black granite countertops, open shelving, ample cabinet space, and stylish finishes. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the family room and opens directly onto a large entertaining deck, making indoor-outdoor gatherings effortless. One of the home's most memorable features is the expansive wraparound porch - the perfect place to relax with morning coffee, unwind in the evenings, or host family and friends. It's easy to imagine this becoming the favorite gathering spot for celebrations, holidays, and casual weekends alike. The original fireplace was recently redesigned and updated. The property itself is equally impressive, with mature landscaping that provides beauty and privacy throughout the seasons. Outdoor features include a garden area, charming greenhouse, and play set, creating a backyard that is both functional and picturesque. Additional custom touches throughout the home reflect the builder's attention to detail, including a few distinctive German windows that enhance both the home's character and energy efficiency. This is more than just a house - it's a lifestyle opportunity in one of Northern Virginia's most beloved historic communities. Inside pictures and floorplan coming soon.

Beautifully appointed and rich in character, this four-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath residence by renowned local builder Paul Reimers is ideally situated in the heart of historic downtown Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed and meticulously maintained, the home offers an exceptional blend of timeless craftsmanship and modern convenience. The interior showcases gleaming wood floors that flow seamlessly throughout the main living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. At the heart of the home, a well-equipped kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinetry-perfectly suited for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. A highly desirable main-level primary bedroom offers both comfort and convenience, providing a private retreat with easy accessibility. This thoughtfully positioned space enhances the home's livability, ideal for a variety of lifestyle needs. Upstairs, additional generously sized bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, home office space, or personal retreats, complemented by a well-appointed bath that reflect the home's classic aesthetic. Outdoors, a fully fenced yard creates a private oasis, ideal for relaxation, play, or al fresco gatherings. A large shed adds both functionality and storage, enhancing the property's practical appeal. Set just moments from Leesburg's charming shops, dining, and historic landmarks, this exceptional home presents a rare opportunity to enjoy refined living in one of Northern Virginia's most desirable settings. Photos to be uploaded 4/25

Now offered at this exceptional value, a beautifully upgraded 5BR/3.5BA home on a lovely .25-acre lot in sought-after Tavistock Farms! Ideally situated on a low-traffic street ending in a cul-de-sac for added privacy, this exceptional home is nestled within an established neighborhood known for mature trees, scenic common areas, and timeless charm. ***OUTDOOR LIVING*** The fully fenced backyard creates a peaceful outdoor retreat with low-maintenance perennials, organic vegetable and herb gardens, a flagstone-style patio, and beautiful sunrise and sunset views, all backing to trees for a serene backyard oasis. ***MAIN LEVEL*** Inside, the thoughtfully designed floor plan offers spacious and inviting living areas ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The light-filled family room flows seamlessly into the renovated chef's kitchen, while formal living and dining spaces provide additional flexibility for gatherings, holidays, or work-from-home needs. Refinished hardwood floors on the main level (2017) add warmth and elegance throughout. ***UPDATED KITCHEN*** The custom chef's gourmet kitchen was fully renovated in 2017 and features Taj Mahal quartzite countertops, custom cabinetry, oversized island, farmhouse sink, travertine backsplash, built-in microwave drawer, under-cabinet lighting, plus a new faucet (2025), refrigerator, and dishwasher. ***PRIMARY SUITE and SECONDARY BEDROOMS*** The spacious primary suite includes two large walk-in closets and a spa-inspired bath renovated in 2019 with heated floors, porcelain tile, soaking tub, walk-in shower, dimmable lighting, custom cabinetry, and energy-efficient toilet. Secondary bedrooms are generously sized, including the lower-level bedroom, plus a bonus room currently used for storage offering additional flexibility. ***LOTS of UPDATES*** Extensive updates and major system improvements provide exceptional peace of mind, including: upper-level baths renovation (2017), basement bath renovation, basement carpet, and mudroom flooring (2026), premium roof replacement (2013), energy-efficient replacement windows on all three levels (2023), two Trane HVAC systems (2018), garage door opener replacement (2023), exterior painting and front portico replacement (2024), oversized gutters (2025), water heater (2015), brand-new dryer (2026), and an 8-zone irrigation system (2018). ***LOCATION*** Conveniently located near Route 7, Route 15, the Dulles Greenway/Toll Road (Route 267), Leesburg Park & Ride, and the W&OD Trail, with easy access to downtown Leesburg, Village at Leesburg, Leesburg Premium Outlets, shopping, dining, and entertainment. Community amenities include a pool, tennis courts, tot lot, trails, and historic clubhouse. ***WELCOME HOME*** With over $250,000 in extensive updates already completed, this truly move-in ready home offers the perfect combination of quality, comfort, convenience, and location in one of Loudoun County's most sought-after communities. Welcome home!

WELCOME TO 314 BELMONT PLACE- **WALKING DISTANCE TO DOWNTOWN LEESBURG & NEW CATOCTIN WALK / HARRISON POST Development with NEW retail and restaurants*** NO HOA, NO HISTORIC REGULATIONS. SO MUCH POTENTIAL. Beautifully maintained brick rambler nestled on a private 12-home cul-de-sac, just steps from the W&OD Trail and within walking distance to everything downtown Leesburg has to offer! Walkable to Catoctin Elementary and LCHS. The main level features 3 spacious bedrooms and 2 full baths. An updated kitchen seamlessly connects the dining room, flexible informal living space, and a large, light-filled family room. Two sliding glass doors open to the patio and backyard-perfect for effortless indoor-outdoor entertaining. The lower level offers a cozy family room ideal for a home office, playroom, or media space, complete with built-in bookshelves. You'll also find two bonus rooms, a full bath, and abundant storage in the unfinished area. A 2-car garage plus a 10x14 shed provide excellent storage options. The fully fenced, flat backyard completes this exceptional property-offering privacy, space, and versatility.

This is the home you have been waiting for! This is a beautifully fully upgraded smart home with 6 bedrooms/5 Full bathrooms and over 4600 sqft of living space located in the quiet community of Evergreen Meadows. If you have been looking for a first floor Bedroom/bathroom, this is the home for you! On the main level, you will find a lovely formal living and dining room, an over sized kitchen, sunroom and family room to spend your precious moments with your family and friends. Upstairs you will find the Primary Suite of your dreams. After a long day, enjoy some relaxation in the Primary suite sitting room or in the spa tub. Also, you with find Three addition bedrooms, a jack and jill bathroom. In addition, an en suite with a full bathroom. Let's take a stroll down to the basement where you will find an extremely large Recreation Room , Bedroom with Full bathroom and a oversized pre-wired theater room. This home is close to shoppes, Dulles Airport, Restaurants and Highways for quick commutes.

Escape to your own private sanctuary in the heart of Tavistock Farms with this stunningly updated five-bedroom home on a premium lot that backs directly to a lush, wooded common area. The main level offers a perfect balance of work and play, featuring a secluded home office with navy accent walls for those who work from home. The back of the house opens up into a massively open kitchen and family room combo that serves as the true heart of the home. This 2022 kitchen renovation is a knockout, featuring a massive white-veined stone island, high-end stainless steel appliances, and custom two-tone cabinetry. It flows directly into the family room, which is anchored by a stone fireplace and a custom live-edge mantle, with a wall of windows that brings the forest views inside. The thoughtful floor plan provides four generous bedrooms on the upper level, including a primary retreat with a dedicated sitting room and spa-like bath. A true standout feature is the fully finished, walk-out lower level, which is expertly designed for multi-generational living or a high-end guest suite. This self-contained space includes a private fifth bedroom with a full-sized window, a full bath, and its own complete second kitchen and breakfast bar-allowing for total independence and comfort. Your outdoor space is built for total privacy, featuring a sprawling rear deck with a gazebo and tea lights, all enclosed in a fully fenced yard where the only neighbors behind you are the trees. This home is completely move-in ready with every major system recently replaced, including a new roof and gutters (2022), high-efficiency HVAC with a UV air filter (2020), and a new water heater (2020). Beyond the property line, the highly sought-after Tavistock Farms community offers a premier lifestyle with an active clubhouse, a swimming pool, and miles of scenic walking trails. You are perfectly positioned just minutes from the charm of historic downtown Leesburg's dining and boutique shopping, while enjoying immediate access to the Dulles Greenway and Route 7 for an easy commute.

Beautifully renovated and thoughtfully designed for comfort and convenience, this spacious 3-bedroom, 3 full bath home offers true one-level living in a quiet, established neighborhood with no HOA. Situated on a large corner lot, the home features hardwood floors throughout the main level, fresh paint, and new carpet in all bedrooms. Each bedroom includes custom closet built-ins for added organization and functionality. The layout is ideal for a variety of needs, including potential handicap accessibility with a roll-in shower. The updated kitchen is equipped with stove, a new microwave, and plenty of space for cooking and gathering. Step outside to enjoy the brand new Trex deck and freshly landscaped yard-perfect for relaxing or entertaining. Additional upgrades include a new HVAC system (August 2025), gutter guards, and an extra-deep two-car garage offering ample storage. The fully finished basement expands your living space with a potential additional bedroom and a separate outside entrance-ideal for a future in-law suite, studio, home office, or rental opportunity. Conveniently located near shopping, commuter routes, schools, parks, and scenic trails, this move-in ready home offers flexibility, modern updates, and a prime location all in one.

Welcome Home to 41726 Stumptown Rd, Leesburg, VA 20176. Nestled on 5.05 private acres, this spacious and versatile property offers the perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and convenience. Boasting over 4,380 finished square feet, this home features 4+ bedrooms and 4 full bathrooms, providing ample space for everyday living and entertaining. Inside, you'll find multiple living areas highlighted by two fireplaces and two wood stoves, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere throughout. The expansive layout offers flexibility for multi-generational living, work-from-home setups, or guest accommodations. Enjoy the outdoors from the large front, side, and rear porches, perfect for relaxing and taking in the scenic surroundings. The property also features an in-ground swimming pool with hot tub, ideal for summer entertaining. Additional highlights include a detached apartment-perfect for guests, rental income, or private office space-and a 1-car garage. Conveniently located just minutes from shopping, grocery stores, local amenities, and Dulles International Airport, this property offers peaceful country living without sacrificing accessibility.

Tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac in a highly desirable non-HOA neighborhood, this beautifully updated home offers the perfect blend of timeless style, modern comfort, and everyday convenience. Thoughtfully renovated from top to bottom with major systems already updated, this exceptional property is truly move-in ready. From the moment you step inside, you'll appreciate the attention to detail including Coretec LVP flooring, custom trim work, updated lighting, and a beautifully updated kitchen at the heart of the home. The stunning renovated kitchen is designed to impress, featuring a large leathered granite island, gorgeous backsplash, and the perfect setup for everyday living and entertaining. Just off the kitchen, the show stopping covered deck overlooks a private, fully fenced backyard with pristine landscaping, creating the perfect outdoor retreat for morning coffee, summer gatherings, or relaxing evenings at home. Upstairs, you'll find four bedrooms, including a spacious primary suite with a walk-in closet and beautifully updated bath. The three additional bedrooms share a nicely updated hall bath. The bedroom-level laundry room is a standout feature, complete with a washer/dryer tower, utility sink, and easy convenience right where you need it most. Ceiling fans in all bedrooms, newer carpet, Coretec LVP flooring throughout the upper hallway and laundry room plus an abundance of natural light complete the upper level. The finished basement offers a cozy rec room with custom built-ins, ample storage space, and a bathroom rough-in for future expansion. Additional updates provide peace of mind, including: roof (2020), water heater (2021), HVAC (2016) with new fan motor (2026), plus all new windows, front door, and sliding glass door (2023). Located just minutes from downtown Leesburg, Leesburg Premium Outlets, dining, shopping, parks, and commuter routes, this home combines beautifully updated living spaces, functional design, and an unbeatable location . All that without HOA restrictions!

Opportunity is knocking ***** This home sits adjacent to two other properties/homes for sale**** Home and adjoining properties have been owned by the same family and is conveniently located in the Leesburg city limits*****DO YOU LOVE VINTAGE?????? This charming place has a throwback in time feel with original kitchen, baths and floors*****All Brick Rambler with a finished Lower Level ****Offers flexibility in the floor plan*****Two Wood Burning Fireplaces**** Hardwood Floors *****Covered Back Patio ******Includes an attached garage plus a detached garage with workshop and two sheds ****Home can be sold by itself although another Rambler next door could make this an interesting Multi Generational Living Lifestyle - just in separate houses for sale see MLS VALO2117372!****Vacant lot for sale too****** Oh the Possibilities !!! Renovation Potential ******NO HOA

Rare investor and renovation opportunity in the ever-popular town of Leesburg, offering the perfect combination of privacy, acreage, and close proximity to Washington, DC. Set on 5 beautiful acres, this classic rambler presents exceptional potential for buyers looking to restore and enhance a property with timeless character and strong long-term value. The existing home features original hardwood floors and wood windows ready to be brought back to life, creating the foundation for a truly stunning renovation. With 3 bedrooms, 3 full baths, and 1,621 square feet above grade, the home offers a functional layout filled with natural light and possibilities for customization. Two wood-burning fireplaces add warmth and charm, while the finished walk-up basement with a full bath provides outstanding flexibility for future private guest quarters, office space, recreation areas, or expanded living options. The walk-up access adds convenience and enhances the home's potential for multi-use living. Outside, the expansive property offers endless opportunities for outdoor living, gardening, recreation, or future improvements, all while enjoying the peaceful setting that makes Leesburg so desirable. Opportunities like this are increasingly hard to find in such a sought-after Northern Virginia location with easy access to shopping, dining, commuter routes, and the Washington, DC metro area. This is a chance to transform a solid home with great bones into something truly special.

Welcome to this beautifully updated 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home with a 2-car garage, ideally situated on in the heart of Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed for both comfort and functionality, this spacious residence is perfect for a growing household. Inside, you'll find hardwood flooring throughout, creating a warm and cohesive feel across the home. The layout offers exceptional convenience with two separate laundry areas-one located on the upper level near the bedrooms and an additional setup on the lower level. The fully finished lower level is an ideal space for entertaining or extended living, featuring a large recreation room with a wet bar, two additional bedrooms, and a full bathroom-perfect for guests, an in-law suite, or private workspace. Beyond the home, enjoy easy access to everything Leesburg has to offer. Commuters will appreciate proximity to Route 7, Route 15, and the Dulles Greenway, as well as convenient access to the Ashburn Metro Station (Silver Line). Daily essentials are just minutes away with nearby grocery options including Wegmans, Giant, and Harris Teeter. Leesburg's vibrant dining and shopping scene is right at your doorstep, with popular restaurants such as Tuscarora Mill, Lightfoot Restaurant, Fire Works Pizza, and SideBar all within a short drive. Historic Downtown Leesburg offers charming boutiques, coffee shops, and community events, while nearby parks and trails provide endless outdoor recreation opportunities. This is a home that truly offers the perfect balance of style, space, and location-an exceptional opportunity you won't want to miss.

BEAUTIFUL COLONIAL IN SOUGHT AFTER KINCAID FOREST. THIS HOME HAS 4 BEDROOMS, THREE AND A HALF BATHS AND A TWO CAR GARAGE. ON THE FIRST LEVEL YOU WILL FIND AN OFFICE, FORMAL LIVING ROOM, FORMAL DINING ROOM, HALF BATH, FAMILY ROOM WITH A FIREPLACE AND AN EAT IN KITCHEN LEADING TO A SUNROOM WITH ACCESS TO THE DECK. THE LAUNDRY ROOM IS ALSO LOCATED ON THIS LEVEL. ON THE SECOND LEVEL IS THE PRIMARY BEDROOM WITH ENSUITE BATH, THREE ADDITIONAL BEDROOMS AND A FULL BATH IN THE HALLWAY. THE LOWER LEVEL HAS A FAMILY ROOM WITH A FULL BATH, PLENTY OF STORAGE AND A WALK OUT SLIDING GLASS DOOR LEADING TO A PRIVATE ENCLOSED BACK PATIO. THE SELLER IS VERY MOTIVATED AND LOOKING AT ALL OFFERS.

Welcome to 107 Appletree Dr NE, a spacious and beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath colonial nestled in the established Carrvale community of historic Leesburg. Situated on a flat and usable .24-acre lot with mature trees and a fully fenced backyard, this three-level home offers the perfect blend of comfort, charm, and convenience. Inside, you'll find an updated kitchen features granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, ample cabinetry, and flows seamlessly into the bright and inviting 3-season sunroom overlooking the backyard. Step outside to the spacious deck and private fenced yard-perfect for entertaining, pets, gardening, or relaxing evenings outdoors. The fully finished walk-up basement adds incredible flexibility with a den, kitchenette, and direct access to the backyard, making it ideal for guests, multi-generational living, a home office, gym, or recreation space. Major updates include a newer HVAC system and a 30-year architectural roof installed in 2016, offering peace of mind for years to come. The oversized 2-car garage and three finished levels provide abundant storage and functional living space for today's lifestyle. Located in the desirable Carrvale neighborhood, residents enjoy a quiet, tree-lined setting just minutes from everything Leesburg has to offer. Conveniently close to historic downtown Leesburg featuring award-winning restaurants, breweries, coffee shops, boutiques, and year-round community events. Nearby shopping includes Leesburg Premium Outlets, Village at Leesburg, grocery stores, fitness centers, and everyday conveniences. Outdoor enthusiasts will love proximity to Ida Lee Park & Recreation Center, the W&OD Trail, local wineries and breweries, parks, and scenic Loudoun County attractions. Commuters will appreciate quick access to Route 7, Route 15, the Dulles Greenway, and Dulles International Airport. This home combines classic colonial charm, functional living space, thoughtful updates, and an unbeatable location in one of Loudoun County's most sought-after communities. Don't miss this incredible opportunity to own in the heart of Leesburg!

Private cul-de-sac setting, an expansive fenced backyard, and major system updates already completed make this home stand out from the start. This 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers bright, oversized living spaces throughout. The main level features a welcoming living room centered around a double-sided fireplace shared with the family room and sunroom, along with spacious dining and gathering areas designed for everyday living and entertaining. The kitchen has been refreshed with painted cabinetry, updated hardware, and a newer refrigerator (2021). Outside, the custom hardscape brick patio completed in 2019 creates an ideal setup for cookouts, outdoor dining, morning coffee, or entertaining guests. The beautifully landscaped front and backyard include a sprinkler system, French drain, updated gutters with LeafGuard protection (2021), and an Amish-built shed (2023) for additional storage and functionality. The home also features a 418 sq ft 2-car garage. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite includes a renovated spa-inspired bath completed in 2025 featuring a jetted tub. Additional bathrooms have also been refreshed with updated finishes, and toilets were replaced throughout the home in 2025 and 2026. The finished walkout basement provides even more flexible living space with a full bath, direct backyard access, and surround sound speakers that convey with the home, making it perfect for movie nights, game days, or a secondary recreation area.
